mdns.c(3) Library Functions Manual mdns.c(3)

NAME

mdns.c - mDNS service discovery UI wrapper for interactive server selection

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define ANSI_CLEAR ' 33[2J 33[H'
ANSI escape codes for TUI. #define ANSI_BOLD ' 33[1m'
#define ANSI_RESET ' 33[0m'
#define ANSI_CYAN ' 33[36m'
#define ANSI_GREEN ' 33[32m'
#define ANSI_YELLOW ' 33[33m'
#define ANSI_CLEAR_LINE ' 33[K'

Functions


void ui_mdns_log_init (void)
Initialize log buffer for mDNS discovery UI. void ui_mdns_log_destroy (void)
Destroy mDNS discovery log buffer. void ui_mdns_log_clear (void)
Clear mDNS discovery log buffer. void ui_mdns_log_append (const char *message)
Append message to mDNS discovery log buffer. ui_mdns_server_t * ui_mdns_query (const ui_mdns_config_t *config, int *out_count)
TUI wrapper around core mDNS discovery. void ui_mdns_free_results (ui_mdns_server_t *servers)
Free results from mDNS discovery. int ui_mdns_prompt_selection (const ui_mdns_server_t *servers, int count)
Interactive server selection. int ui_mdns_select (const ui_mdns_server_t *servers, int count)
TUI-based server selection with formatted display. const char * ui_mdns_get_best_address (const ui_mdns_server_t *server)
Get best address for a server.

Detailed Description

mDNS service discovery UI wrapper for interactive server selection

Pure TUI wrapper that calls discovery_mdns_query() from discovery.c. Provides interactive terminal UI for server selection and address resolution.

Definition in file ui/mdns.c.

void ui_mdns_free_results (ui_mdns_server_t * servers)

Free results from mDNS discovery. Free results from TUI discovery query.

76                                                      {
77   discovery_mdns_destroy(servers);
78 }




References discovery_mdns_destroy().


Referenced by client_main().






const
  char * ui_mdns_get_best_address (const ui_mdns_server_t *
  server)


Get best address for a server. Get best address representation for
    a discovered server.


Definition at line 235 of file ui/mdns.c.


235                                                                      {
236   if (!server) {
237     return "";
238   }
239 
240   // Prefer IPv4 > name > IPv6
241   if (server->ipv4[0] != '\0') {
242     return server->ipv4;
243   }
244   if (server->name[0] != '\0') {
245     return server->name;
246   }
247   if (server->ipv6[0] != '\0') {
248     return server->ipv6;
249   }
250 
251   return server->address; // Fallback to address field
252 }






References ui_mdns_server_t::address,
    ui_mdns_server_t::ipv4, ui_mdns_server_t::ipv6, and
    ui_mdns_server_t::name.


Referenced by client_main(),
    ui_mdns_prompt_selection(), and ui_mdns_select().






void
  ui_mdns_log_append (const char * message)


Append message to mDNS discovery log buffer. Delegates to the
    logging system which automatically captures to session log buffer.




Parameters


message Log message to append


Definition at line 45 of file ui/mdns.c.


45                                              {
46   if (message) {
47     log_info("%s", message);
48   }
49 }

void
  ui_mdns_log_clear (void )


Clear mDNS discovery log buffer. Delegates to terminal_screen log
    clear. Useful when starting fresh mDNS discovery screen.


Definition at line 41 of file ui/mdns.c.


41                              {
42   terminal_screen_log_clear();
43 }

  ui_mdns_log_destroy (void )

void
  ui_mdns_log_init (void )


Initialize log buffer for mDNS discovery UI. Delegates to
    terminal_screen log initialization. Call once at startup before rendering
    mDNS discovery screen.


Definition at line 29 of file ui/mdns.c.


29                             {
30   session_log_buffer_t *buf = terminal_screen_log_init();
31   if (buf) {
32     log_set_session_log_buffer(buf);
33   }
34 }






References log_set_session_log_buffer(), and
    terminal_screen_log_init().






int
  ui_mdns_prompt_selection (const ui_mdns_server_t * servers, int
  count)


Interactive server selection. Display discovered servers to user
    and prompt for selection.


Definition at line 83 of file ui/mdns.c.


83                                                                          {
84   if (!servers || count <= 0) {
85     return -1;
86   }
87 
88   // Display available servers
89   printf("\nAvailable ascii-chat servers on LAN:\n");
90   for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
91     const ui_mdns_server_t *srv = &servers[i];
92     const char *addr = ui_mdns_get_best_address(srv);
93     printf("  %d. %s (%s:%u)\n", i + 1, srv->name, addr, srv->port);
94   }
95 
96   // Prompt for selection
97   printf("\nSelect server (1-%d) or press Enter to cancel: ", count);
98   fflush(stdout);
99 
100   // Read user input
101   char input[32];
102   if (fgets(input, sizeof(input), stdin) == NULL) {
103     printf("\n");
104     return -1; // EOF or error
105   }
106 
107   // Check for empty input (Enter pressed)
108   if (input[0] == '\n' || input[0] == '\r' || input[0] == '\0') {
109     return -1; // User cancelled
110   }
111 
112   // Parse input as number
113   char *endptr;
114   long selection = strtol(input, &endptr, 10);
115 
116   // Validate input
117   if (selection < 1 || selection > count) {
118     printf("⚠️  Invalid selection. Please enter a number between 1 and %d\n", count);
119     return ui_mdns_prompt_selection(servers, count); // Re-prompt
120   }
121 
122   return (int)(selection - 1); // Convert to 0-based index
123 }






References ui_mdns_server_t::name,
    ui_mdns_server_t::port, ui_mdns_get_best_address(), and
    ui_mdns_prompt_selection().


Referenced by ui_mdns_prompt_selection().






ui_mdns_server_t * ui_mdns_query (const
  ui_mdns_config_t * config, int * out_count)


TUI wrapper around core mDNS discovery. Discover ascii-chat
    servers on the local network via mDNS.




Calls discovery_mdns_query() from discovery.c with
    TUI-friendly configuration.


Definition at line 56 of file ui/mdns.c.


56                                                                                 {
57   if (!out_count) {
58     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "out_count pointer is NULL");
59     return NULL;
60   }
61 
62   *out_count = 0;
63 
64   // Apply defaults if needed
65   int timeout_ms = (config && config->timeout_ms > 0) ? config->timeout_ms : 2000;
66   int max_servers = (config && config->max_servers > 0) ? config->max_servers : 20;
67   bool quiet = (config && config->quiet);
68 
69   // Call the core mDNS discovery function from discovery.c
70   return discovery_mdns_query(timeout_ms, max_servers, quiet, out_count);
71 }






References discovery_mdns_query(),
    ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, ui_mdns_config_t::max_servers,
    ui_mdns_config_t::quiet, SET_ERRNO, and
    ui_mdns_config_t::timeout_ms.


Referenced by client_main().






int
  ui_mdns_select (const ui_mdns_server_t * servers, int count)


TUI-based server selection with formatted display. Displays
    discovered servers in a terminal UI with the following features:


    
  
  • Clears terminal and displays formatted server list
    • 
  
  • Shows "No results" message if no servers available
    • 
  
  • Allows numeric input for selection
    • 
  
  • Shows helpful prompts and icons
    • 



Parameters


servers Array of discovered servers


count Number of servers


Returns


0-based index of selected server, or -1 to cancel


Definition at line 149 of file ui/mdns.c.


149                                                                {
150   if (!servers || count <= 0) {
151     // No servers found - return special code
152     // Message will be printed at exit in client main
153     return -1;
154   }
155 
156   // Lock terminal to prevent concurrent logging from overwriting TUI
157   bool prev_lock_state = log_lock_terminal();
158 
159   // Clear terminal
160   log_plain("%s", ANSI_CLEAR);
161 
162   // Display header
163   log_plain("\n");
164   log_plain("%s╭─ 🔍 ascii-chat Server Discovery %s────────────╮%s\n", ANSI_BOLD, ANSI_RESET, ANSI_BOLD);
165   log_plain("│%s\n", ANSI_RESET);
166   log_plain("%s│%s Found %d server%s on your local network:%s\n", ANSI_BOLD, ANSI_GREEN, count, count == 1 ? "" : "s",
167             ANSI_RESET);
168   log_plain("%s│%s\n", ANSI_BOLD, ANSI_RESET);
169 
170   // Display server list with formatting
171   for (int i = 0; i < count; i++) {
172     const ui_mdns_server_t *srv = &servers[i];
173     const char *addr = ui_mdns_get_best_address(srv);
174 
175     log_plain("%s│%s  ", ANSI_BOLD, ANSI_RESET);
176     log_plain("%s[%d]%s %-30s %s%s:%u%s", ANSI_CYAN, i + 1, ANSI_RESET, srv->name, ANSI_YELLOW, addr, srv->port,
177               ANSI_RESET);
178     log_plain("\n");
179   }
180 
181   log_plain("%s│%s\n", ANSI_BOLD, ANSI_RESET);
182   log_plain("%s╰────────────────────────────────────────────╯%s\n", ANSI_BOLD, ANSI_RESET);
183 
184   // Prompt for selection
185   log_plain("\n");
186   log_plain("Enter server number (1-%d) or press Enter to cancel: ", count);
187   fflush(stdout);
188 
189   // Unlock before waiting for input (user might take time)
190   log_unlock_terminal(prev_lock_state);
191 
192   // Read user input
193   char input[32];
194   if (fgets(input, sizeof(input), stdin) == NULL) {
195     return -1;
196   }
197 
198   // Check for empty input (Enter pressed)
199   if (input[0] == '\n' || input[0] == '\r' || input[0] == '\0') {
200     return -1;
201   }
202 
203   // Parse input as number
204   char *endptr;
205   long selection = strtol(input, &endptr, 10);
206 
207   // Validate input
208   if (selection < 1 || selection > count) {
209     printf("%sError:%s Please enter a number between 1 and %d\n\n", ANSI_YELLOW, ANSI_RESET, count);
210     return ui_mdns_select(servers, count); // Re-prompt
211   }
212 
213   // Lock terminal again for final output
214   prev_lock_state = log_lock_terminal();
215 
216   // Clear screen and show connection status
217   log_plain("%s", ANSI_CLEAR);
218   log_plain("\n");
219   log_plain("%s🔗 Connecting to %s...%s\n", ANSI_GREEN, servers[selection - 1].name, ANSI_RESET);
220   log_plain("\n");
221   fflush(stdout);
222 
223   // Brief delay so user can see the selection before logs overwrite it
224   platform_sleep_ms(200);
225 
226   // Unlock terminal now that TUI is complete
227   log_unlock_terminal(prev_lock_state);
228 
229   return (int)(selection - 1); // Convert to 0-based index
230 }






References ANSI_BOLD, ANSI_CLEAR, ANSI_CYAN,
    ANSI_GREEN, ANSI_RESET, ANSI_YELLOW,
    log_lock_terminal(), log_plain, log_unlock_terminal(),
    ui_mdns_server_t::name, platform_sleep_ms(),
    ui_mdns_server_t::port, ui_mdns_get_best_address(), and
    ui_mdns_select().


Referenced by client_main(), and
  ui_mdns_select().
